# Sprint 8 Week 1 Review — Presentation Outline

**Date:** Friday, March 27, 2026  
**Time:** 14:30 - 16:00 CST  
**Sprint:** Sprint 8, Week 1 (Mar 23 - Mar 27)  
**Location:** Conference Room A / Zoom

---

## Agenda

| Time | Duration | Item | Owner |
|------|----------|------|-------|
| 14:30 - 14:35 | 5 min | Welcome & Sprint Overview | Alex Zhang |
| 14:35 - 14:50 | 15 min | Backend Engineering Update | Bai |
| 14:50 - 15:05 | 15 min | Frontend Engineering Update | Chen |
| 15:05 - 15:20 | 15 min | QA & Testing Report | Dana |
| 15:20 - 15:35 | 15 min | Key Metrics & Risk Assessment | Alex Zhang |
| 15:35 - 15:55 | 20 min | Open Discussion & Q&A | All |
| 15:55 - 16:00 | 5 min | Action Items & Next Steps | Alex Zhang |

---

## Team Member Presentation Modules

### 1. Welcome & Sprint Overview (Alex Zhang)
- Sprint 8 goals recap
- Week 1 at-a-glance summary
- Overall velocity and output trends
- Introduction of agenda

### 2. Backend Engineering Update (Bai)
- **Completed This Week:**
  - API request trend analysis (Mar 25)
  - Error event summary report (Mar 25)
  - API versioning ADR finalized (Mar 24)
- **Key Deliverables:**
  - `20260325_api_request_trend.json`
  - `20260325_error_event_summary.json`
  - `20260324_api_versioning_adr.json`
- **Blockers:** API versioning approval pending from Architecture Board
- **Next Week Plan:** Address error event root causes, begin v2 endpoint implementation

### 3. Frontend Engineering Update (Chen)
- **Completed This Week:**
  - Kanban board snapshot analysis (Mar 26)
  - User activity report (Mar 25)
  - Sprint meeting notes compilation
- **Key Deliverables:**
  - `20260326_kanban_snapshot.json`
  - `user_activity_report.json`
  - `SprintMeetingNotes.json`
- **Metrics Highlight:** User engagement trending stable
- **Next Week Plan:** UI refinements based on user feedback

### 4. QA & Testing Report (Dana)
- **Completed This Week:**
  - CI build report (Mar 23)
  - Test coverage analysis (Mar 23)
  - Risk assessment v2 (Mar 26)
- **Key Deliverables:**
  - `20260323_ci_build_report.json`
  - `test_coverage_20260323.json`
  - `risk_assessment_v2.md`
- **Concerns:** Test coverage gaps in error handling paths
- **Next Week Plan:** Expand test coverage, validate error event fixes

### 5. Key Metrics & Risk Assessment (Alex Zhang)
- **Output Summary:** 15 deliverables produced this week
- **Velocity Trend:** Consistent daily output (3→3→4→5)
- **Active Risks:**
  - API versioning approval delay
  - Error event investigation required
  - Test coverage below target (68% vs 80% goal)
- **Mitigation Plans:** Reviewed and assigned

---

## Q&A Time Slots

### Structured Q&A (15 min)
| Time | Topic | Lead Respondent |
|------|-------|-----------------|
| 15:35 - 15:40 | Backend/API Questions | Bai |
| 15:40 - 15:45 | Frontend/UX Questions | Chen |
| 15:45 - 15:50 | QA/Testing Questions | Dana |

### Open Floor Discussion (10 min)
- **15:50 - 16:00**
- Cross-functional questions
- Stakeholder feedback
- Concerns and suggestions

---

## Pre-Review Checklist

- [ ] All presentation materials uploaded to shared drive
- [ ] Metrics dashboard refreshed with latest data
- [ ] Blocker status confirmed with stakeholders
- [ ] Demo environment verified and accessible
- [ ] Action items template prepared

---

## Post-Review Action Items Template

| ID | Action Item | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|----|-------------|-------|----------|--------|
| 1 | | | | |
| 2 | | | | |
| 3 | | | | |
